name: Car Parking Jam
author: Poki
description: Car Parking Jam is a car un-jamming, de-congesting game where you need to use your wisdom to move the cars out one by one! Solve parking gridlocks with your strategic skills, avoiding collisions and watching out for vigilant police officers. Can you untangle the parking chaos and unlock as many cars as possible? How to play Car Parking Jam? Click on a car and use the mouse to move it! Drag the mouse in the desired direction to steer the car that way! Who created Car Parking Jam? Car Parking Jam is created by Refold. Play their other game on Poki: Sector 781 ! How can I play Car Parking Jam for free? You can play Car Parking Jam for free on Poki. Can I play Car Parking Jam on mobile devices and desktop? Car Parking Jam can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
